title: GTA VI + GPT-6: Rockstar's AI Mechanics Revealed
summary: A YouTube video examining claims about GTA VI using GPT-6, arguing instead that Rockstar has built proprietary real-time behavioral simulation systems based on patents and job postings. The creator rates the reliability of leaked information and compares GPT-6, Claude 5, and Gemini 3.5 capabilities within their own platform.
writeup: The video pushes back on claims that GTA VI runs on GPT-6, arguing instead that Rockstar has developed proprietary real-time behavioral simulation systems, a case built from patents and job postings rather than a third-party model integration. It also rates the reliability of the circulating leaks and compares GPT-6, Claude 5, and Gemini 3.5 capabilities. Key concepts include world simulation, persistent memory, and large language models. The takeaway: the AI mechanics likely originate in-house, and the popular GPT-6 narrative is treated as unverified.
